title: eremophila elderi
intro: Eremophila elderi is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as the elder emu bush or elder's wings. The plant is native to Western Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eremophila elderi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
